parameters.jsonBody: ={{ ({ status: 'success', workflow: $workflow.name, stage_name: $json.stage_name, run_id: ($json.run || {}).run_id, retries_used: $json.run_retries_used || 0, output_metrics_json: ($json.run || {}).output_metrics_json || {} }) }}

={{ ({ status: 'failed', workflow: $workflow.name, stage_name: $json.stage_name, run_id: ($json.run || {}).run_id, retries_used: $json.run_retries_used || 0, error_message: ($json.run || {}).error_message || $json.failure_reason || 'Stage failed' }) }}
